Sent: Tuesday, April 7, 2026 11:50 AM
To: Social Media <socialmedia@tlcnj.com>
Subject: AI

[cid:ii_mnoso9zk0]
YouTube Shorts Storyboard — “Smart Lock for Your Shore House”
0:00 – Hook Shot (0–1 sec)

Visual: Extreme close‑up of the keypad lighting up. On‑screen text: “This door lock is WILD.” Audio: Quick whoosh or tap sound.

0:01 – Feature Flash (1–3 sec)

Visual: Pull back slightly to show the full lock on the door. On‑screen text: “WiFi + Bluetooth” Voiceover (optional): “Meet the smartest lock on LBI.”

0:03 – Lifestyle Shot (3–5 sec)

Visual: Door opens to reveal the bright, stylish interior behind it. On‑screen text: “Perfect for Shore Houses” Voiceover: “Control it from anywhere.”

0:05 – Demo Moment (5–7 sec)

Visual: Finger taps keypad → lock engages. On‑screen text: “Touchpad Entry” Audio: Satisfying click.

0:07 – Local Tie‑In (7–8 sec)

Visual: Quick cut to the lock again, clean angle. On‑screen text: “Available on LBI 🇺🇸” Voiceover: “Built for barrier‑island living.”

0:08 – Call to Action (8–10 sec)

Visual: Final close‑up of the lock with soft lighting. On‑screen text: “Tuckerton Lumber Company – Ship Bottom” Voiceover: “Upgrade your entryway today.”

If you want, I can also create:

  *   A version using trending sounds
  *   A version with humor
  *   A version optimized for retargeting ads
  *   A version that matches your brand voice exactly

Just tell me the vibe you want next? "AI"

Facebook Post (Tuckerton Lumber Company – LBI, NJ)

🔥 Grill season is rolling in with those perfect LBI breezes! This Weber Genesis is built for backyard feasts, beach‑house cookouts, and every summer gathering in between. Durable, reliable, and ready for anything island life throws at it.

Whether you're hosting after a beach day or firing up dinner at the shore house, this grill delivers serious performance.

Stop by the store right here on the island — we’ve got Weber models in stock and ready for pickup before the season kicks into high gear.

🏝️ Shop local. Grill better. Enjoy LBI. #TuckertonLumber#TLCNJ#LBINJ #ShopLocalLBI #WeberGenesis #BarrierIslandLiving #BackyardBBQ

posts.caption:
Renovation season starts at the register. Our Tuckerton team is tearing down and rebuilding the checkout area — because after 90+ years, even we need an upgrade.

New layout. Better flow. Same hometown service.

Tuckerton Lumber — always improving.
www.tlcnj.com

#TuckertonLumber #StoreRenovation #ShopLocal #LBI #JerseyShore #AlwaysImproving
posts.notes: Auto-created from inbox: FW: Checkout tear down. Was stuck in 'creating' — fixed April 27.

posts.caption:
Deck season is HERE. Composite decking from Wolf and Trex - low maintenance, no splinters, no staining, and built to last 25+ years.

We carry a full line of composite and PVC decking at both locations. Stop in and see the samples - your bare feet will thank you.

Tuckerton Lumber - your deck headquarters since 1932.
www.tlcnj.com

#TuckertonLumber #CompositeDeck #WolfDecking #Trex #DeckSeason #LBI #JerseyShore #OutdoorLiving #ShopLocal

posts.caption:
The perfect color starts with Benjamin Moore.

Tuckerton Lumber is your authorized Benjamin Moore dealer - over 3,500 colors, expert color matching, and the quality paint pros trust. From Regal Select to Aura, we carry the full line.

Stop by Tuckerton or Surf City and let us help you find your color.

Tuckerton Lumber - Benjamin Moore headquarters since 1932.
www.tlcnj.com

#TuckertonLumber #BenjaminMoore #Paint #ColorMatch #LBI #JerseyShore #HomeImprovement #ShopLocal

posts.caption:
Your front door called. It wants an upgrade.

Introducing Reeb Finish Express at Tuckerton Lumber - gorgeous pre-finished Therma-Tru fiberglass entry doors delivered in DAYS, not weeks.

Total Eclipse (black) or Alaskan Storm (white)
10-year warranty
Pre-finished BOTH sides - no painting, no waiting
Multiple styles with coordinated glass and hardware

Summers coming. Your beach house deserves a front door that turns heads.

Tuckerton and Surf City | Since 1932
www.tlcnj.com

#TuckertonLumber #FrontDoorGoals #CurbAppeal #LBI #JerseyShore #ReebFinishExpress #BeachHouse #HomeUpgrade #ShopLocal
posts.source: Denise Moon email - Reeb Finish Express brochure

posts.caption:
Inside the Surfbox warehouse - where your storage solution starts.

Our containers are built tough, clean, and ready to roll. Whether its a beach house renovation, a big move, or contractor supplies - we deliver it, you fill it, we pick it up.

Simple. Secure. Surfbox.

Call: (855) SURFBOX | (855) 787-3269
www.surfboxstorage.com

#Surfbox #PortableStorage #BehindTheScenes #LBI #JerseyShore #StorageSolutions #OceanCounty
posts.source: Real photos from Surfbox operations

posts.caption:
Another day at the office. The Surfbox crew takes their breaks seriously - Adirondack chairs, sunshine, and the best seats in the house.

We work hard, we have fun, and we deliver. Thats the Surfbox way.

Need portable storage? We make it easy.
Call: (855) SURFBOX | (855) 787-3269
www.surfboxstorage.com

#Surfbox #TeamSurfbox #LBI #JerseyShore #SmallBusiness #WorkHardPlayHard #PortableStorage #OceanCounty

posts.caption:
Loaded up and ready to roll. Our containers are built for the Jersey Shore - tough enough for construction sites, clean enough for your driveway.

Moving? Renovating? Decluttering? We deliver it. You fill it. We pick it up. Simple.

Call: (855) SURFBOX | (855) 787-3269
www.surfboxstorage.com

#Surfbox #PortableStorage #ReadyToRoll #LBI #JerseyShore #MovingDay #Renovation #OceanCounty #StorageMadeSimple
posts.source: Real photo - Surfbox yard with forklift

posts.caption:
This is how we do it. Hydraulic lift, precision placement, zero hassle.

Our custom flatbed trucks deliver your Surfbox container right where you need it - driveway, job site, backyard. We handle the heavy lifting so you dont have to.

Call: (855) SURFBOX | (855) 787-3269
www.surfboxstorage.com

#Surfbox #PortableStorage #DeliveryDay #HeavyLifting #LBI #JerseyShore #Construction #OceanCounty

posts.caption:
Spring cleaning season is officially here -- and your garage doesn't have to suffer.

Surfbox brings the storage to YOU. Our portable containers are delivered right to your driveway. Fill it at your own pace, then we haul it away -- or store it at our facility until you're ready.

No trips to a storage unit. No renting a truck. Just call, we deliver, you fill it, we pick it up.

Simple. Affordable. Surfbox.

posts.caption:
LBI real estate is moving -- and spring is the best time to make yours.

Inventory on Long Beach Island is tight, buyer demand is strong, and well-priced homes are going fast. If you've been thinking about selling your beach house, the window is open right now.

I'll walk you through current comps, what buyers are actually looking for this season, and what your home could realistically sell for today -- no pressure, just real numbers.

Ready to talk? Let's connect.
